text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's it for today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Me too.
choice_data_list: Wanna get some food? My treat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Still feeling chatty, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll just hit up the cafeteria. Laters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As briskly as I'm brushed off, Narita Brian walks away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still trying to learn more about her, so I try to strike up a
conversation whenever I can...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But we've yet to have a real back-and-forth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm on my way to the shopping mall to buy some things.
Suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, it's you.
choice_data_list: Hey there. You doing some shopping too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The student council is being a pain. They asked me to get something for them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're headed for the same place. This could be a great chance to
spend time together. I should ask her—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And she's gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she doesn't trust me as much as I thought. I guess she really
doesn't want to do anything together besides training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's the holdup? Come on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're going to the mall too, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hurry it up then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've arrived at the mall, but I can see from a distance that the
stores are packed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Undaunted by the crowds, she picks a store and walks right inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to get my shopping done, but I realize Brian isn't anywhere
to be seen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look around for her to no avail. With little else to try, I head outside
and realize it's already dark out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's when...

text_block_list.name: Elated Young Man
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's Narita Brian! I saw you race! Hey, can I take a pic?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Get lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brian flat out refuses the fan and drives him off. Then she glances
over in my direction.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Finally... Took you long enough.
choice_data_list: I thought you went home by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Nope. 'Cause it's dark.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It is dangerous to walk the streets alone at night, but I can't imagine her being too concerned about that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just walk already. Or I'll leave you behind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Worried... Was I worried? I'd actually like to know.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: When we got separated, I imagined my trainer looking for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I didn't even consider any other possibility.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So I just... stopped right there. I chose to wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I didn't complain or feel frustrated... I just stood there patiently.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This feeling is kind of familiar.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Is this nostalgia? It feels like when I was a kid...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You never get tired of trying to talk to me, do you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Even though I never say much in return. Normally that'd drive a person
away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can believe that. But whenever I say something, she always listens.
And honestly...
choice_data_list: The fact that you're willing to listen is enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... You must be out of your mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't have to hand this stuff in until tomorrow. Laters, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thank her for waiting for me and she heads home without another
word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Awkward as it may have been, I feel glad to have caught a glimpse of
Narita Brian's kind side.
